name: Property Card
description: Single property overview card with key metrics including address, unit count, occupancy rate, and monthly revenue.

standard.description: Full property card with image and all metrics

slots.metrics: Unit count, occupancy rate, monthly revenue
slots.status: Property status badge (active, inactive, for sale)

compact.description: Condensed card for grid view without image

visual_brief: Bordered card with a property photo at the top, followed by the property address and name. A metrics row shows unit count, occupancy rate (as a percentage with color coding — green for high, red for low), and monthly revenue. An action bar at the bottom provides View and Edit buttons. The compact preset removes the photo and shows a denser card with just address, key metrics, and actions. The list-item preset renders as a horizontal row suitable for table-like lists. Status badges indicate property state (active, maintenance, vacant).

responsive.mobile: Cards take full width. Photo height reduces. Metrics wrap to two rows. Action buttons go full-width.
responsive.tablet: Two-column card grid. Standard card proportions with photo.
responsive.desktop: Three-column grid or larger. Cards at comfortable size with all metrics inline.
